scope.role: single-label aggregate falsification and label-proxy diagnostics for the shared-threshold working posterior's cardinality implications
scope.interpretation_limit: flat pooled PIT or favorable mass reliability cannot identify the pointwise conditional cardinality law, establish posterior calibration, validate Q_p, or establish Jaccard-Wasserstein agreement
scope.use_policy: held-out labels summarize predeclared diagnostics only and must not fit, tune, or select a confidence score

provenance.input_policy: explicit records.jsonl paths; no discovery or globs

randomized_cardinality_pit.interpretation: pooled pseudo-randomized label-proxy falsification diagnostic; not a pointwise posterior-calibration estimate
